rationale: Keep because the citing study’s core outcomes include new product introductions and it explicitly uses RavenPack in its archival design, while the cited paper is a major RavenPack-based new product announcement study that develops how such announcement data should be interpreted. That overlap in construct (NPIs) and data/method context makes the citation plausibly methodological or foundational rather than an obvious incidental mention, even though only a single DOI match is provided.
